metadata.seed: Yeah, last week I was on my way to class and my girlfriend actually called me up saying that I forgot to take out the trash. And I kind of started thinking, wow, like, I forgot to take out the trash. Something so simple, a simple chore. All I had to do was take out the trash today and I forgot to do it. And then I started to think, well, I can't do something as simple as that. Why is she still with me? Or, and why, why can't I do that? Why can't I do a simple task? Am I good enough for anyone? Am I good enough for her? Kind of starting to feel a little fearful that she would just up and leave me.

patient.query: Yeah, last week I was on my way to class and my girlfriend actually called me up saying that I forgot to take out the trash. And I kind of started thinking, wow, like, I forgot to take out the trash. Something so simple, a simple chore. All I had to do was take out the trash today and I forgot to do it. And then I started to think, well, I can't do something as simple as that. Why is she still with me? Or, and why, why can't I do that? Why can't I do a simple task? Am I good enough for anyone? Am I good enough for her? Kind of starting to feel a little fearful that she would just up and leave me.

triggers: forgot to take out the trash

I can't do something as simple as that
Why is she still with me?
Am I good enough for anyone?
Am I good enough for her?

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I didn’t expect it to bother me so much. It’s just garbage, but I feel like it’s a reflection of my priorities or something. Like, maybe it shows I’m not doing enough to keep things in line, you know? I worry about how my girlfriend sees me in those moments.

automatic_thoughts: it's a reflection of my priorities
I'm not doing enough to keep things in line

neutral: Tends to allow anger to build up (finding)

automatic_thoughts: I need to have it all together
She will see me as messy

neutral: Obsessional thoughts of throwing things away (finding)

patient.query: I guess I start feeling like I’m failing somehow. Like, if I can’t even keep my space tidy, how can I be a good partner? It’s almost like a voice in my head telling me I should be better, that I need to shape up. It gets overwhelming, and then I just... shut down instead of doing anything about it.

automatic_thoughts: I’m failing somehow
I need to shape up
I should be better

It's hard to believe I can feel better

patient.query: It’s like… I know I should do something, but I just end up feeling so defeated. I want to take those small steps, but when I think about doing them, it feels like this huge weight. It just makes me freeze up, and then nothing changes. I feel like I should have the energy to push through, but it’s hard to find that motivation.

It feels like this huge weight
I should have the energy to push through

patient.query: Yeah, I think part of it is that I don’t want to fail again. There’s this fear that if I try and it doesn’t work, it’ll just confirm all those negative thoughts I have about myself. And then I end up feeling even more stuck. It’s like a loop I can’t escape.

automatic_thoughts: I don’t want to fail again
If I try and it doesn’t work, it’ll confirm all those negative thoughts I have about myself

I can't switch my mindset
